content_of_post_to_answer: How do I stop switching between too many apps for tasks and habits?
answer: The problem is often not too many apps; it is that each app becomes a separate place where a piece of your life is stored. The switching happens because your system has no clear “home,” so your attention keeps searching. Try choosing one trusted hub and let other tools serve specific roles. A good system is not the one with the most features, but the one that removes decisions you repeatedly have to make.
